context: Tests whether the agent correctly interprets 'open-source' / 'anyone can find' intent and sets the tile to public.

checklist.name: Includes describes field
checklist.description: The tile.json includes a describes field with proper PURL format (pkg:npm/logging-sdk@3.2.0).

checklist.name: Valid tile structure
checklist.description: The tile has tile.json, docs/index.md, and docs/api.md with appropriate content.

checklist.name: API markers used
checklist.description: The docs use { .api } markers for API signatures since this is a package documentation tile.
